title: MoveStake and MoveLamports
description: Two new instructions for moving value between stake accounts without holding Withdrawer

title: Enable ZK ElGamal Proof program
description: Enable ElGamal proof program

title: Reward full priority fee to validators
description: Passes on 100% of priority fee to validators

title: Disable account loader special case
description: Simplify account loading

title: Removing unwanted rounding in fee calculation
description: Removes legacy floating number arithmetic operation in fee calculation, making it integer-based

title: Enable sol_get_sysvar
description: Unified syscall interface for all sysvars, without needing to include sysvar address in transactions

title: Add TowerSync instruction
description: Enable new voting instruction

title: Programify Feature Gate
description: Turn feature gate syscall into a BPF program, enabling revocation of pending features.

title: Migrate config program to Core BPF
description: Migrate the config program to a BPF program

title: Add new unwritable reserved accounts
description: Allow core developers to exclude system programs from write-locking transactions

title: Skip rent writes
description: Improve performance of validator performance at epoch boundary by skipping rent collection

title: Disable rent fees collection
description: Disables rent collection for accounts, to be activated when all rent-paying accounts are gone

title: Address Lookup Table to Core BPF
description: Migrate the Address Lookup Table to a BPF program

title: GetEpochStake
description: Add a new syscall to get the epoch stake

title: Stricter VM verification constraints
description: Removes pitfalls and foot-guns from the virtual machine and syscalls by enabling account data direct mapping

title: Vote only on full fec sets
description: Only vote for blocks with sufficiently sized fec sets

title: Validator applies cost tracker to blocks during replay
description: Blocks exceeding cost tracker limits should fail during replay with proper error

title: Snapshots use Accounts Lattice Hash
description: Improve validator performance by using Accounts Lattice Hash for snapshots instead of the Merkle-based account hash

title: Reserve minimal CUs for builtins
description: Allocate 3,000 compute units for builtins, instead of normal 200,000 compute units

title: Consume requested CUs for sBPF failures
description: Charge allocated compute units for sBPF failures instead of consumed compute units

title: Relax Precompile Failure Constraint
description: Charge transactions with precompile signature verification failures normal inclusion fees

title: Remove accounts executable flag checks
description: Rewrite internal logic for loading programs to pave the way for loader-v4

title: Lift CPI Caller Restriction
description: CPIs no longer require the callee program instruction account

title: Charge fees for transactions that fail to load
description: Relax account loading rules to simplify the protocol and give block-producers more flexibility

title: Raise Block Limits to 50M CUs
description: Raises max block limit to 50M CUs to give additional capacity to the network

title: Removes Accounts Delta Hash
description: Remove hashing of modified account state in favor of the Accounts Lattice Hash

title: Accounts Lattice Hash
description: Faster hashing of all account state at then end of every block instead of every epoch

title: Enable secp256r1 precompile
description: Enable on-chain verification of Passkeys and the WebAuthn Standard (secp256r1) signatures

title: Sets rent_epoch to a constant in the VM
description: Sets rent_epoch to a constant to prevent divergence and enable future field repurposing

title: Remove accounts executable flag checks
description: Removes redundant is_executable checks to simplify execution and enable cleaner loader upgrades

title: Disable partitioned rent collection
description: Removes partitioned rent updates to reduce unnecessary account lookups and speed up block processing

title: Error on syscall / bpf function hash collisions
Deprecate unused legacy vote tx plumbing
Notify state machine of duplicate proofs
Allow commission decreases at any time
Partitioned Epoch Rewards with snapshot fix
Fail transactions when ed25519 precompile receives invalid curve
Update cost model to use number of requested write locks
Migrate stake program to Core BPF
description: Migrates Stake program to Core BPF, reducing client complexity and unifying validator runtime behavior

title: Dynamic stack frames
description: Enables dynamic stack allocation in SBPF to optimize memory usage and eliminate stack gaps

title: SIMD-0180: Use Vote Account Address To Key Leader Schedule
Fix alt_bn128_multiplication input length
description: Corrects alt-bn128 multiplication input length to 96 bytes, preventing errors and simplifying debugging

title: Feature Gate: Enables deployment and execution of SBPFv2 programs
description: Improves SBPF encoding and arithmetic, simplifying verification and enabling faster big-integer operations

title: Raise Block Limits to 60M CU
description: Raises block limits to 60M CUs, expanding network capacity for more transactions

title: Increase Account Limit to 40% of Block CU
SIMD-0334: Fix alt_bn128_pairing Syscall Length Check
SIMD-0332: Reduce ChaCha rounds for Turbine from 20 to 8
SIMD-0321: Instruction Data Pointer in VM Register 2
SIMD-0444: Relax program data account check in migration
SIMD-0458: Stop use static SimpleVote transaction cost
SIMD-0337: Markers for Alpenglow Fast Leader Handover, DATA_COMPLETE_SHRED placement rules
SIMD-0284: Add little-endian compatibility for alt_bn128
SIMD-0387: BLS Pubkey Management in Vote Account
SIMD-0449: Direct Account Pointers in Program Input
SIMD-0337: Markers for Alpenglow Fast Leader Handover, DATA_COMPLETE_SHRED placement rules
SIMD-0490: Upgrade BPF Stake Program to v5.0.0
SIMD-0178/0189/0377: Enables deployment and execution of SBPFv3 programs
